species: Here, we describe the discovery of one of the largest tailed viruses in the known virosphere (averaging 1350 nm), named Naiavirus.
cell_type: giant viruses of amoebae have garnered attention from the scientific community...
sample_source: This virus, isolated from a swamp biome in Brazil...
cell_line: the remaining experiments were primarily conducted in Acanthamoeba castellanii and Vermamoeba vermiformis...
strain: the samples were processed and then inoculated in Vermamoeba vermiformis (ATCC 50237).
